docs.failure_signature: Vibration levels spike (bearing wear), high temperature near main drive spindle
docs.action_taken: Replaced rotary bearing B-10 and adjusted rotor alignment

docs.failure_signature: Overheating shutdown triggered, core temperature reached 99.1°C
docs.action_taken: Cleaned heat exchanger lines and replaced cooling fan F-8

docs.failure_signature: Pressure valve leak detected, line pressure fluctuated between 80-140 PSI
docs.action_taken: Replaced pressure valve V-12 and high-temp gasket

docs.failure_signature: [RECOMMENDATION] Prescriptive mitigation: No active recommendations. Machine operation normal.
